sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(date AS DATE)) AS month, type AS transaction_type, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM trans WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(date AS DATE)) IN (1997,1998) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2; SELECT COALESCE(k_symbol,'UNKNOWN') AS purpose_code, COUNT(trans_id) AS transaction_count FROM trans WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(date AS DATE)) IN (1997,1998) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY transaction_count DESC; SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(date AS DATE)) AS month, AVG(balance) AS avg_post_transaction_balance FROM trans WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(date AS DATE)) IN (1997,1998) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

chart_spec.layout_intent: Primary stacked monthly amount chart on top, with purpose mix and balance trend below.
